package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for transport_tests_bypass_service_interface_and_touch_repo_directly: Transport tests that skip the service seam and assert repository behavior.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule212NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule212NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule212NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario212Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule212NegativeService, input Rule212NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
